description: The nine S16.4 light statuses, each with one primary effect, a typical removal, and a text+glyph pair (never color-only). Mirrors components/status.js's STATUS_DISPLAY -- tests/test_stacks_ui.py cross-checks this fixture against the source so the two cannot silently drift.

statuses.label: Confused
statuses.primaryEffect: First targeted action shows two possible targets

statuses.label: Silenced
statuses.removal: Break source, writing tool, room end

statuses.label: Exhausted
statuses.primaryEffect: Begin next world round with 3 Energy

statuses.label: Marked
statuses.primaryEffect: Named enemy gains an effect against the hero
